new_videos_found.title: Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani Announces Two New Appointments
Zohran Mamdani for NYC is live!
Make space in the briefing room.
Know your rights. Protect your neighbors. New York is — and always will be — a city for all immigrants.
Every country playing in NYC next summer already has a community that calls New York home.
More than 2,500 Starbucks workers are on strike. They're demanding dignity: fair pay, safe conditions, a contract that respects their labor.

notes: 9 videos found absent from metadata.json across both platforms. All are historical gaps from Dec 2025 — no content newer than 2026-01-01 (the most recent YouTube upload already in metadata). YouTube: yt-dlp returned 15 videos matching known IDs; RSS feed (channel UCkIS8hii93hF2q0TQFD-sEQ) surfaced 4 appointment announcement videos from Dec 2025 not captured in original scrape. TikTok: yt-dlp playlist failed due to user-ID extraction error; workaround used numeric uploader_id (7182182367388730414) to retrieve 20 videos — 5 are new to metadata, all Dec 2025. TikTok dates estimated from video ID timestamp encoding (id >> 32 = Unix timestamp).
